_doc: Which level-frame badge the HUD level chip shows, by player Level. Badges are games/grove/assets/ui/<dir>/<prefix>NN.png, sliced from assets/_originals/ui/lvls2.png (plainest ring 00 -> grand crown 35). The Level->badge map is BANDED so the badge changes fast early and slows down: walk `bands` in order, each contributes `tiers` consecutive badge indices that each span `levels_per_tier` levels. Past the last band the badge holds at badge_count-1. The legacy single-band form (top-level levels_per_tier, no bands) is still honoured.
